response.overview: While people may think they know what nurses do, this documentary reveals the emotional challenges nurses face on a daily basis when caring for patients. These are nurses’ stories about compassion and empathy, the grief that doesn’t disappear, and the catharsis that comes from being heard. Through these personal stories, revealing the moments of doubt, faith, grief, joy, and fierce love that shape every act of care, the film celebrates nurses as the heroes they truly are.
response.title: Nurse: Empathy Heals
